name: frequencyAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (Array.isArray(output.result.topContentWords) && output.result.topContentWords.every(function(w){ return typeof w.word === 'string' && Number.isFinite(w.count) && Number.isFinite(w.frequency); }))

input.text: the cat the cat the dog runs fast and the cat sleeps

_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'linguistics.frequencyAnalysis'. Reads artifact.data.text (String-coerced — hardened). Returns {totalWords,uniqueWords,topContentWords:[{word,count,frequency}],hapaxLegomena,zipfCompliance}; stop-words excluded from topContentWords. Every count/frequency stays FINITE on poisoned input. Pinned by server/tests/linguistics-lens-macros.test.js.
